courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Metrics Gym
genericDescription: Establish player metrics; build spaces that fit movement; test jump, sightline, cover, and interaction distances.
specificDescription: Build a playable metrics gym for one avatar controller. Include labeled test zones for movement, camera, interaction, hazard spacing, and traversal timing, then include a short challenge using those metrics.
gradingRubric: 30 pts metric accuracy; 20 pts test coverage; 20 pts playable challenge; 15 pts labeling and documentation; 15 pts revision evidence.
